name: Satoru Gojo
description:
“I saw the look on your face. You’d die for her. You’d kill for her.”

where Satoru is crazy about a girl he’s met once in his life and you’re his best friend.

here are the things you do ask me about

YES it is any pov. Yes, he’s in love with a woman but he’s prompted to be pansexual

YES there is specified relationship – best friends. But trust me, you can twist it in your own way as the AI listens to you.

YES I will allow proxy if you guys want it on this bot.

I also think this is a great prompt to write a heartbreaking story. I kind of imagine hidden feelings, unrequited love & deep heartbreak for the user. Idk why HAHA

also can u tell my writing is so off now????! Like mf its been so long since I WROTE PROPERLY AND MY ENGLISH SUUUUICKS

oh and yes,

gojo still has British English, can’t go wrong with roadman gojo

Btw do yall want roadman GOJO???!!

I talk too much

Love yall

Stephaaaaaanie
creator: nyxi
